$comment: Curated model-family affinities per area — ADVICE consumed by /init question 8, never applied automatically. This data ROTS: rankings shift with every model release. Refresh on `berserqir update`; always show sourcedAt to the user.

front.leaning: visual-strong families tend to lead frontend/UI generation benchmarks (layout fidelity, aesthetic defaults, CSS reasoning)
front.caveat: verify against current WebDev Arena standings before accepting

back.leaning: agentic-coding leaders tend to win on API design, refactoring depth and long-context server work

ops.leaning: review precision and instruction-following matter most for gates and pipelines; prefer a DIFFERENT family from the implementer (anti self-preference)

infra.leaning: strict schema adherence (HCL/YAML) and low hallucination rates matter more than creativity
